file_summary: This file implements the core signing functionality for itsdangerous, providing a Signer class that can sign and verify data using various key derivation methods and algorithms. It includes abstract and concrete signing algorithms (NoneAlgorithm, HMACAlgorithm), key derivation implementations (concat, django-concat, hmac, none), and the main Signer class with methods for signing, verifying, and validating signatures.

line_windows.summary: Imports and base classes: SigningAlgorithm abstract class, NoneAlgorithm (no-op signing), HMACAlgorithm (HMAC-based signing), and helper function _lazy_sha1 for FIPS compatibility.
HMACAlgorithm.get_signature implementation, _make_keys_list helper, and start of Signer class with constructor documentation and default configuration attributes.
Signer constructor implementation (initializes secret_keys, salt, key_derivation, digest_method, algorithm), secret_key property, and start of derive_key method for key derivation logic.
derive_key method implementations (concat, django-concat, hmac, none), get_signature, sign, verify_signature, unsign, and validate methods for signing and verifying values.
Defines unsign() method to extract and verify signature from signed value, and validate() method to check signature validity without returning payload.
